headline.purpose: The single current-state headline on permission and recovery surfaces.

control.purpose: Compact labels in the contextual inspector.

measurement.purpose: Exact frame dimensions and elapsed recording time.

motion.name: panel-reveal
motion.purpose: A short opacity reveal when the attached inspector appears; disabled when Reduce Motion is active.

motion.name: record-press
motion.purpose: Confident press feedback on the ready-state Record action.

components.name: Ready Inspector
components.description: The stable 310 by 50 point control surface used in every capture state, attached six points from the selected frame and always stacked above its draggable capture boundary.
components.css: .ds-ready-inspector { width: 296px; height: 36px; padding: 7px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #FCFCFD; border: 1px solid #D7D7DD; border-radius: 14px; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.16); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', sans-serif; } .ds-ready-inspector button { height: 36px; border: 1px solid #D7D7DD; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-ready-inspector button:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6758E8; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Selection Frame
components.description: A crisp Canvas Indigo boundary with four persistent square handles, direct manipulation, and keyboard or VoiceOver adjustment.
components.html: Drag inside to move  ·  Pull a corner to resize
components.css: .ds-selection-frame { position: relative; width: 360px; height: 200px; border: 1px solid #6758E8; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.88) inset; } .ds-handle { position: absolute; width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 2px; background: #6758E8; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.92) inset; transition: width 100ms, height 100ms; } .ds-handle:hover { width: 10px; height: 10px; } .ds-nw { left: -4px; top: -4px; } .ds-ne { right: -4px; top: -4px; } .ds-sw { left: -4px; bottom: -4px; } .ds-se { right: -4px; bottom: -4px; } .ds-coach { position: absolute; top: 12px; left: 12px; padding: 8px 11px; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(252,252,253,.96); color: #1D1D20; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.18); font: 500 11px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', sans-serif; }

components.name: Frame Size Trigger
components.description: The exact exported GIF size opens containment-first frame presets and an explicit action that adds 16 output pixels of breathing room.
components.css: .ds-size-trigger { height: 36px; padding: 0 10px; background: #F2F2F5; color: #1D1D20; border: 1px solid #D7D7DD; border-radius: 8px; font: 600 12px ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-size-trigger:hover { background: #EEECFF; } .ds-size-trigger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6758E8; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-size-trigger:active { background: #E3E0FF; }

components.name: More Button
components.description: A quiet progressive-disclosure trigger for cursor, countdown, and cancel.
components.css: .ds-more { width: 36px; height: 36px; padding: 0; background: #F2F2F5; color: #1D1D20; border: 1px solid #D7D7DD; border-radius: 8px; font: 600 12px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', sans-serif; letter-spacing: 1px; } .ds-more:hover { background: #EEECFF; } .ds-more:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6758E8; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-more:active { background: #E3E0FF; }

components.name: Record Button
components.description: The sole prominent ready-state action; indigo means editable and ready.
components.css: .ds-record { width: 86px; height: 36px; background: #6758E8; color: #FAFAFC; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12); border-radius: 8px; font: 600 12px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', sans-serif; transition: background 140ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1); } .ds-record:hover { background: #5F50E0; } .ds-record:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6758E8; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-record:active { background: #5546D7; }

components.name: Stop Button
components.description: Recording red is introduced only for the live stop action.
components.css: .ds-stop { height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; background: #D13D43; color: #FAFAFC; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.12); border-radius: 8px; font: 600 12px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', sans-serif; } .ds-stop:hover { background: #C4373E; } .ds-stop:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #D13D43; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-stop:active { background: #B82F36; }

components.name: Permission Status
components.description: A single-state permission explanation with local-only reassurance and one primary recovery action.
components.html:
GifJotScreen Recording⌑ Local only
✓

You’re ready

Choose an area, adjust the frame directly, and press Record.

GifJot captures only after you press Record. GIFs stay on this Mac.
components.css: .ds-permission { width: 452px; padding: 24px; background: #F9F9FB; color: #1D1D20; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', sans-serif; } .ds-permission header { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; padding-bottom: 18px; border-bottom: 1px solid #DADAE0; } .ds-permission header span { color: #5D5D66; font-size: 11px; } .ds-permission header em { margin-left: auto; color: #5D5D66; font-size: 11px; font-style: normal; } .ds-permission main { display: flex; gap: 16px; padding-top: 24px; } .ds-permission main i { width: 52px; height: 52px; display: grid; place-items: center; background: #EEECFF; color: #6758E8; border-radius: 12px; font-style: normal; } .ds-permission h2 { margin: 0 0 7px; font-size: 22px; letter-spacing: -.4px; } .ds-permission p { margin: 0; color: #5D5D66; font-size: 13px; } .ds-permission aside { margin-top: 22px; padding: 13px; background: rgba(238,236,255,.62); color: #5D5D66; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 12px; } .ds-permission button { float: right; margin-top: 20px; min-height: 36px; padding: 0 14px; background: #6758E8; color: #FAFAFC; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-permission button:hover { background: #5F50E0; } .ds-permission button:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6758E8; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-permission button:active { background: #5546D7; }

narrative.overview: GifJot feels native to the creative work already happening on screen. The selected region is the canvas object, and a calm contextual inspector stays attached to it. Neutral adaptive macOS materials carry the chrome, Canvas Indigo communicates editability and readiness, and Recording Red is reserved for live capture.
keyCharacteristics: Direct manipulation instead of configuration-first flows.
One compact attached inspector with exact exported GIF dimensions in the primary path.
Containment-first presets preserve selected content, while surrounding pixels are added only by an explicit action.
Secondary choices revealed progressively through More.
One-time guidance that recedes after the action is learned.
Clear semantic separation between ready and recording.

rules.name: The Semantic Accent Rule
rules.body: Indigo means editable or ready. Red means actively recording or stopping. Neither color is decorative.

rules.name: The Plain Language Rule
rules.body: Labels name the user's action or current result; internal capture terminology never appears in the primary path.

rules.name: The Flat Canvas Rule
rules.body: Depth belongs to controls above the canvas, never to the capture boundary itself.

rules.name: The Precise Crop Rule
rules.body: Never include pixels outside the selected frame unless the user explicitly chooses a frame preset or breathing room action.

dos: Do make the selected region feel like a familiar editable object.
Do keep live dimensions readable and directly actionable.
Do preserve the selected content when applying an aspect preset.
Do use native menus, keyboard actions, materials, and accessibility semantics.
Do let one-time guidance recede after movement or resizing is learned.
donts: Don't style the primary path like camera hardware or a developer overlay.
Don't use red before recording is live.
Don't expose quality, frame rate, output width, and countdown as equal first-step decisions.
Don't leave movement, resizing, or cursor state dependent on hover alone.
Don't silently add surrounding pixels to a precise crop.
